codeReview.summary: The SKILL.md documentation was comprehensively updated to document all 7 preset commands (add, list, show, run, edit, remove, use) with complete flag references, JSON output schemas, practical examples, parameter types table, error codes table, SQL injection protection section, and agent-friendly patterns. The version was bumped from 3.2.0 to 4.0.0 with updated metadata tags and capabilities.

summary: PASS - The skill documentation fully covers all preset commands with comprehensive examples, parameter types reference, error codes table, and agent-friendly patterns. All expected behaviors from the feature definition are fulfilled. The documentation aligns with the implemented CLI commands and provides actionable guidance for agents using the preset system.
